Beginner's Guide 📘

Android 📱

Software 💾

Useful 🔧

Games 🎮

Developer 👨‍💻

Unsafe ⚠️

On this page

Useful ​

Essential websites, privacy tools, and extensions for security and convenience.

Websites ​

  • getPaidStock, downpic, istock, downlaoder.la - download paid stock photos

  • HaveIbeenPwned passwds - check if your passwd was in a data breach

  • VirusTotal - scans through various popular anti-malware scanners

  • SpotX - block spotify ads

  • Annas Archive - Ebooks download

  • HiAnime, AnimePahe - anime streaming

  • KayoAnime, TokyoInsider - anime downloading

  • PdfGear - offline pdf toolkit

  • Sejda, iLovePDF - online pdf toolkits

  • HaveIbeenPwned - check if your email was in a data breach

  • LinkTree, Bento, Bio Link - link in bio sites

  • Lucida, 2 - audio downloader, supports flac/alac

Privacy ​

  • Proton Mail - better privacy mail

  • TempMail - generate disposable emails

  • Zemail, Emailnator - generate disposable gmails

  • Smail - generate disposable gmails and outlook

  • SimpleLogin, Addy - send/receive mail without revealing your actual email (email aliasing)

Extensions ​

Never use multiple adblockers in a browser, they harm more than good

Just using ublock for adblocking should do your work.

Must haves in both browsers

  • Brave - inbuilt adblocker, Proton Pass

  • Firefox - Ublock, ProtonPass

  • Sponsor Block - skip youtube sponsorships & shoutouts

  • Price Tracker - track price history of ecommerce websites

  • ClearUrls - remove tracking elements from URLs

  • Return YouTube Dislike - unhides the dislike count on youtube
